raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Gavin Newsom signed legislation to ban deceptive deepfakes in elections.",
    "AB 2655 requires large online platforms to remove postings of deceptive content upon complaint.",
    "The law aims to protect election integrity from AI-generated disinformation.",
    "AI-generated disinformation poses a clear and present risk to elections and democracy.",
    "Deepfakes are recognized as a powerful and dangerous tool for disinformation campaigns.",
    "Advances in AI have made it easy for anyone to generate hyper-realistic content.",
    "AB 2655 mandates online platforms to restrict the spread of election-related deceptive deepfakes.",
    "The law requires platforms to label materially deceptive content as manipulated and not authentic.",
    "Disinformation has intensified since 2020, impacting politics more than ever.",
    "Deepfakes have destabilized national elections in countries such as Argentina, Slovakia, Taiwan, and Bangladesh."
  ]
}
```
